commands.review_summary:
Adds `agents.byId.<agentId>` Policy plugin overlays for workspace and tool posture, with shape validation, scoped findings, tests, and docs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new Policy plugin capability and docs contract, not a bug report with a failing current-main reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: There is no narrow automation repair; the remaining blocker is maintainer approval of a protected policy/security-boundary API change.

target.title: Policy: add agent-scoped policy overlays
target.body:
## Summary

Implements agent-scoped Policy overlays under agents.byId.<agentId> for the policy sections whose evidence is already attributable to a named agent: workspace and tools.

The overlay model is additive: top-level tools.* and agents.workspace claims still run, while agents.byId.<agentId>.workspace and agents.byId.<agentId>.tools can add stricter named-agent claims and emit their own findings against the same observed config.

This branch is rebased on current main after #85482 and #85795, so Galin's previous tools.alsoAllow feedback is no longer in the PR surface: main now records global and per-agent alsoAllow as toolPosture evidence and includes attestation coverage for it.

## Verification

- pnpm docs:list
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/cli/policy.md docs/plugins/reference/policy.md docs/plan/policy-agent-scoped-overlays.md extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts
- pnpm docs:check-mdx docs/cli/policy.md docs/plugins/reference/policy.md docs/plan/policy-agent-scoped-overlays.md
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts -- --reporter=dot
- git diff --check
- codex review --base origin/main

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Policy conformance can now express stricter workspace and tool posture claims for a named agent without weakening deployment-wide policy claims.
Real environment tested: WSL checkout at /root/src/openclaw-policy-agent-scoped-design on Ubuntu-24.04.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran docs listing, MDX validation, Markdown formatting, whitespace checks, focused Policy plugin doctor/CLI tests, and Codex review against origin/main.
Evidence after fix: Policy shape validation accepts agents.byId.<agentId>.workspace and agents.byId.<agentId>.tools; policy findings for scoped overlays are filtered to evidence with the matching agentId; global and scoped findings can both fire for the same nonconforming named-agent config.
Observed result after fix: 157 focused Vitest tests pass; docs checks, formatting checks, whitespace checks, and Codex review pass with no accepted/actionable findings.
What was not tested: Full repository test suite; this change is scoped to Policy plugin conformance and policy docs.
